_comment: Ancient God Land Level 3 — Annihilation Realm. Canon (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L48): The deepest level of Tu Si's corpse realm. The Soul Devourer activation zone where Tuo Sen (Tu Si's demonic thought) is trapped. The most dangerous zone — annihilation energy saturates everything. Only Soul Formation+ cultivators can survive here. Wang Lin reshaped his body using the ancient knowledge in this very realm. World-law tier: high. Prime Directive: the annihilation energy is an objective property of this zone — it is the concentrated residual power of an 8-star Ancient God's core. It exists regardless of who enters.
